h1.visual_description: Not visible on this page; typically the main paper title, centered and large.

h2.visual_description: Bold, numbered (e.g., 4.3.2), larger than body text, left-aligned with significant leading space.

h3.visual_description: Bold run-in heading at the start of a paragraph, same font size as body text, followed by a period.

visual_matchers.pattern: Bold text within table data cells
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Represents the best-performing metric or score in a comparison.
Indicates a specific dataset or feature was included in the model training configuration.
Indicates a specific dataset or feature was excluded from the model training configuration.
Table caption prefix followed by descriptive text, located below the table.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX-style inline ($...$) for variables and metrics like 'H6'.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Internal cross-references to tables using 'Tab. [Number]' (e.g., Tab. 4).

layout_info.primary_flow: multi-column (two-column text layout with tables that may span one or both columns)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Standard academic margins; potential for page numbers or running headers at the extreme top or bottom edges.
